title: senecio donianus
intro: Senecio donianus, also known as Don Ian's Ragwort, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats region in India, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio donianus include its ability to protect against liver damage, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, which are used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat conditions like jaundice, fever, and digestive issues.
